title: ERP system inaccessible
description: Starting around 17:20 today, the ERP system is completely inaccessible for login or use. Multiple colleagues in Finance Dept and Warehouse Dept have reported the same issue. The page shows a 503 error.

title: Daily report email not received today
description: Normally the system sends an automated daily report email every morning at 9:00 AM, but it was not received today. Already checked the spam folder with no results.

title: ERP order data not updating
description: Today's afternoon orders are not visible in the ERP system. The last order shown is from before 17:00. Suspect a data synchronization issue.

title: Frequent printer paper jams
description: The HP printer in the 3rd floor printing room is frequently jamming. It has been cleared several times but the problem persists.

title: Disk space alert
description: The log archival server received a disk space low alert. The /data/archive partition usage has reached 98% and needs cleanup or expansion urgently.
